title: Raspberry Pi Roof Rack Sensor Mount

lumber.note: 1 crossbar 32 in, 1 upright 24 in, 2 braces 11 in top edge at 45 deg

crossbar_clamp.description: Holes for roof-rack mounting bolts through crossbar (flat face), near each end
crossbar_clamp.note: 3/8-16 carriage bolt clearance. Two holes per end, at 3-in and 6-in from each end of the crossbar. Measure your rack bar positions and adjust offset to suit.

upright_pipe_screw.description: Pilot holes through upright face to pin pipe to upright, on centreline
upright_pipe_screw.note: 3/16 pilot for #10 × 3 wood screw. Both holes on X=0 centreline, drilled along Y. 6-in and 12-in down from top of upright. Screw passes through pipe wall into wood.

brace_screw.description: Pilot holes through 45-degree brace face into crossbar and upright
brace_screw.note: 3/16 pilot for #10 wood screw. Hole axis perpendicular to the 45-degree brace face. 2 per brace end × 2 brace ends per brace × 2 braces = 8 total.

upright_clamp_slot.description: Hose-clamp band pass-through holes at each end of the upright
upright_clamp_slot.note: 0.5-in clearance holes for clamp band, 1.5-in apart along Z axis, centred on upright width (X=0). Two holes at each end (top and bottom) drilled along X axis through the narrow face.

corner_brace_screw.description: Pilot holes for 3x3-inch L-bracket screws at T-joint between upright and crossbar
corner_brace_screw.note: 2 brackets (one per ±Y face). Crossbar holes at 0.5-in and 1.5-in inset from the ±D/2 face edge. Upright holes at same Z positions, drilled along Y.
